Volume I · No. 1 — The Analyst's Portfolio — New York · 2026
A Treatise on Data & Decisions

Data, decoded.

❦ ❦ ❦

A business analyst from New York, lately of Syracuse — turning data into decisions with rigor, restraint, and the occasional well-placed dashboard.

The Practitioner

Myra Correia is a business analyst with two-plus years of experience defining metrics, automating reporting pipelines, and architecting dashboards. She holds an MS in Business Analytics from Syracuse University's Whitman School.

The Toolkit

Fluent in SQL, Python, Tableau, and Power BI. Certified by AWS in Data Analytics and trained in Lean Six Sigma. Equally comfortable writing a Random Forest regression as drafting a BRD.

The Approach

Believes great analytics is repeatable, defensible, and beautiful. Measures twice. Documents always. Treats every dataset as an argument waiting to be made — or rebutted.

An Analyst's Profile

✦ ✦ ✦

A brief account of training, temperament, and trade.

Miss Myra Correia Whitman School of Management · 2026
Syracuse
'26
— About the Analyst —

Measure twice, ship once.

I define the metrics, build the pipelines, and design the dashboards that turn ambiguous business questions into defensible answers.

Based in New York and trained in Mumbai, I hold an MS in Business Analytics from Syracuse University's Whitman School of Management, with a 3.85 GPA. My two-plus years of professional work span SQL reporting pipelines at Limeneal Solutions, Power BI executive dashboards, Python predictive models, and DMAIC process audits at Syracuse University.

I'm a firm believer in slow, careful analysis — and faster, cleaner reporting. AWS Data Analytics certified,Microsoft Business Analysis certified, and a Google IT Automation certified.

'25
Aug — Dec 2025
Syracuse, NY

Lean Six Sigma Consultant

Syracuse University

  • Delivered stakeholder presentations with statistical evidence that drove documentation automation decisions.

  • Optimized ETL pipelines with IT and stakeholder teams, enforcing data validation, QA, and governance standards.

The DoorDash Delivery Analytics Platform

04
Vanilla JS Chart.js Census Data Civic Tech

India Literacy Intelligence

A conversation with a friend changed how I saw the numbers — so I built an interactive dashboard analyzing literacy across Indian states using the 2001 and 2011 Census. Six chart types — treemap, scatter, dumbbell, diverging bars, gauge, and heatmap — hand-built from scratch, no frameworks.

+14.8pp
Bihar's leap

Chart types
2x

Examine the Project ↗
05
SCM 701 Vanilla JS SEC 10-K Logistics Featured

Coca-Cola Supply Chain Intelligence Dashboard

A SCM 701 final project at Whitman that grew into something I couldn't stop building. An interactive supply chain dashboard analyzing Coca-Cola's operations — risk pooling across six regional hubs, dynamic pricing, and a 250,000-vehicle fleet running 94% AI-optimised routes. Hand-coded with vanilla JS, sourced from Coca-Cola's 2024 annual report, SEC 10-K, and sustainability disclosures.
